mentions.note: Real company with solid revenues, big AI customers (76% YoY growth in AI customer count), and improving financials. Cloud storage up 24% YoY. But hardware costs up 30% YoY, heavy hyperscaler competition, and poor timing as speculators liquidate AI names for mega-IPOs. Valuation 3x sales, 50x forward earnings not compelling. Put a pin in it.

Cloud storage and backup company with cloud storage up 24% YTD, AI customers up 76% YTD. Moving toward profitability; solid real business. But lacks explosive AI growth of hottest names; equipment costs surging 30% YTD. Timing bad with SpaceX IPO liquidations. Put a pin in it; not the right time.
Cloud storage platform; Cramer unfamiliar with company despite caller's positive experience. Will research with team before recommending.
